scripts.dual-package: echo 'adding package.json to each lib folder for dual output support' && yarn tsconfig-to-dual-package ./tsconfig-cjs.json ./tsconfig-esm.json
scripts.compile: echo 'compiling CJS' && tsc -p tsconfig-cjs.json && echo 'compiling ESM' && tsc -p tsconfig-esm.json
scripts.copy-to-lib: echo 'copying other files to lib folder' && yarn copyfiles -u 1 ./src/**/*.scss ./src/**/*.json ./lib/esm && yarn copyfiles -u 1 ./src/**/*.scss ./src/**/*.json ./lib/cjs
